nasb.text: When they had struck them with many blows, they threw them into prison, commanding the jailer to guard them securely;

esv.text: And when they had inflicted many blows upon them, they threw them into prison, ordering the jailer to keep them safely.

cnv.text: 打了很多棍，就把他們放在監牢裡，吩咐獄吏嚴密看守。

ccb.text: 他们被毒打一顿，又被关进监狱，官长命狱卒严密看守。

csbs.text: 打了很多棍以后，把他们投进监狱，吩咐狱卒好好地看守。
